subject: no sun devil update meeting monday 10/1

emails.subject: RE: No Sun Devil update meeting Monday 10/1
emails.subject_base: No Sun Devil update meeting Monday 10/1
emails.body: RE: No Sun Devil update meeting Monday 10/1 Kevin, when and where is the meeting on 10/8? Thanks, Kim.

emails.subject: RE: No Sun Devil update meeting Monday 10/1
emails.subject_base: No Sun Devil update meeting Monday 10/1
emails.body: 3pm in 42c1. Has anyone talked with Caithness lately? I heard their water rights got shot down at the local town council. Is there a possibility they may want to move their project a little further east so that it sits on the Sun Devil expansion?

emails.subject: RE: No Sun Devil update meeting Monday 10/1
emails.subject_base: No Sun Devil update meeting Monday 10/1
emails.body: Kevin, Sorry, I did not see this message until after Steve's staff meeting which is from 2:30 to 3:30 every Monday. Do you have some time tomorrow I'll catch you up on Caithness. Thanks, Kim.

emails.subject: RE: No Sun Devil update meeting Monday 10/1
emails.subject_base: No Sun Devil update meeting Monday 10/1
emails.body: How about 9:00 am on Tues? I'll come see you. Thanks, kim.
